title: malus pumila var. mitis
intro: Malus pumila var. mitis, also known as the Siberian crabapple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Malus pumila var. mitis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Malus pumila var. mitis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
